name: Tortilla Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine undrained tomatoes, onion, garlic, cilantro, and sugar.
Blend until chunky.
2. In a large saucepan, add the vegetable mixture and chicken broth.
Add the cubed chicken pieces and simmer for 20 minutes, seasoning to taste.
3. To serve, place cheese, avocado, and broken chips at the bottom of a bowl.
Pour the hot soup over this in the bowl.
4. Serves 4-6 people.
